title: Accurate subs for DEATH True2
wikitext:
[]: Accurate subs for DEATH (True)2             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 17, 2015 9:54 pm So, is anyone even interested in having accurate Death subs? Because I have about as accurate of a subtitle track as I could muster given what I have at my disposal. (AKA, no Rosetta Stone to walk me through moonspeak.) I’ve been slowly working through this since summer of 2014. (Given that I juggle freelance and part-time work, I had very little free time to dedicate to this.) I decided to take the universally accepted Platinum:Perfect subs from ADV's DVD release of NGE and edited the existing subtitles in Death with the subtitles the TV show. I figured that this not only helps in accuracy but also in consistency between the two works. Also decided to give the subtitles a visual face-lift. The fonts and colors for the subtitles for on-screen signs and title-cards now match a bit more with the colors and lettering used on the signs and title cards. Also, for the scenes where there are multiple characters talking or being heard at once, I found a way of coloring and arranging the subtitles so we can read the “foreground” voices over the background clatter. Here are some examples of how they look... Scientists/Staff Subtitles in white on top: Gendo/Committee subtitles in yellow on the bottom: Example of matching subtitle font to title cards: Also, there were a lot of instances where Manga Ent’s release of Death didn’t subtitle the background dialogue, and merely just focused on the more prominent voice-over explaining things. I fixed that oversight. Ritsuko’s more prominent voice-over in yellow on the bottom, Rei’s dialogue played as background in the film displayed in white on the top: ^ Rei’s dialogue was missing in the subs for Manga Ent’s release. It’s a shame to, because it plays so well juxtaposed to Ritsuko’s confessions. Just so everyone know: These subtitles were timed using the Japanese Renewal release as reference. They may not sync as well with the Manga Ent discs. If you are using the Manga Ent disc, you may need to retime the subtitles in your media player of choice in order to get them to sync well. (I use VLC. It works there.) Now, if anyone can tell me of a good place where I can upload the .ass file so that you guys or even others can download them as they please.

[]: Re: Accurate subs for DEATH (True)2             Quote Post by Atropos » Sat Jan 17, 2015 10:03 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: So, is anyone even interested inhaling accurate Death subs?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 17, 2015 10:24 pm MediaFire Link: http://www.mediafire.com/download/rxcmu1vq5e5np51/01+DEATH+%28True%29².ass Tell me if you guys find any weird typos, missing dialogue, or whatever else that I may have missed or something. I certainly want to improve upon this if it’s not sufficient.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Wed Feb 18, 2015 4:43 pm Would it be possible to upload the script too?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 04, 2015 3:37 pm I didn't actually download this, but there's a noticeable typo in your first screenshot: "Mr. Ikagi ." Ritsuko and Gendo's lovechild?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Apr 04, 2015 3:40 pm Yesss... I'll fix that and a few other issues I've found once I get the chance.
